## Problem

What operational or engineering problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change as concretely as possible.

## Why It Fits ARCE

Explain why this belongs in ARCE instead of downstream application code.

## Alternatives Considered

List simpler or existing alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, or implementation notes if relevant.
